name: vibelyf-api-worker
description: Cloudflare Workers API proxy for VibeLyf — server-side LLM calls + prompt caching + provider failover. Replaces direct browser-to-provider API calls.

scripts.secret:set:all: echo 'Run each secret:set:* command interactively (wrangler prompts for value)'

author: Brad Powell (Elev8 AI Solutions)
